idea-plugin.name: PO Editor
idea-plugin.description:
A focused table editor for GNU gettext .po translations and .pot templates, built directly into JetBrains IDEs.

  • Edit identifiers, source text, and translations side by side.
  • Create PO translations and POT templates from the New menu.
  • Update translation catalogs from standard gettext/Babel templates.
  • Scan source code and Jinja2 templates for translation calls such as t("key") and _('key').
  • Validate PO syntax and compile catalogs to MO with GNU gettext.
  • Highlight untranslated, fuzzy, completed, and obsolete entries.

Supports both standard gettext entries using msgid and context-based catalogs using msgctxt.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial public release.
  • PO/POT table editor with validation and MO compilation.
  • Source scanning for Kotlin, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, Jinja2, Vue, Svelte, and other common source formats.
  • Standard Babel/gettext POT synchronization.
